programme.title: Big Little Journeys
programme.desc: A Taiwanese pangolin travels through a land of giants to seek a mate, and in Brazil, a family of tamarins travel to the edge of their world to seek a new future alongside humans.

programme.title: Paddy and Chris: Road Tripping
programme.desc: The second leg of Paddy and Chris's European health quest takes them to Ikaria, the island of longevity. They road-test the lifestyle and their mettle in seeking the secrets to a longer life.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: Ben spends time with Pirate Rob, who lives for half the year with his 18-year-old son Damien in a sandbag house on an island in the middle of an industrial river in Oregon.

programme.desc: Robson Green travels to Guatemala in Central America to fish for one of the fastest fish on planet Earth.

programme.title: Big Zuu & AJ Tracey's Rich Flavours
programme.desc: In Seoul, the pair meet Korean millionaires, Michelin-star chef Yannick Alléno, YouTube star Mukbang and sample a Korean barbecue platter worth £850.

programme.title: Nigella's Cook, Eat, Repeat
programme.desc: Nigella champions the much-maligned bacon of the sea, the anchovy, which she uses to create an elixir to accompany seared steak or crisp, red chicory.

programme.title: Next Level Chef UK
programme.desc: The competition is heating up as the 10 remaining cooks must make the perfect burger and chips, and Gordon Ramsay and his two fellow mentors put on a masterclass.

programme.title: Jamie's Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes a delicious soup using discounted veg that's on the turn, an easy cheesy soda bread, a money-saving DIY takeaway chicken burger, and old-school iced buns with low-cost dough.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: It's the quarter-final and the teams make desserts celebrating caramel and a Winter Wonderland-themed frozen lollipop display. Who'll crack under the pressure and be frozen out?

programme.title: Listing Mauritius
programme.desc: Today Mridula is in Mont Choisy with clients Pavel and Elena, and Nikita shows Viviane and Mike a property in Grand Baie. Samuel meets social media vlogger Lucy to expose villas to potential buyers in Tamarin, Rinie works on plans to present off-plan developments to her clients, and Grahame is in Anahita to inspect the most expensive property on the island.

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: Set designers creates a dystopian looking glamping site and a muck spreader hides a luxury camper. Plus, a wattle and daub classroom and an old Portuguese home with a stunning modern extension.

programme.desc: Guillaume Brahimi explores some of the bistros in the fifth and sixth arrondissements, and catches up with Yves Camdeborde.

programme.title: Cook Clever, Waste Less With Prue & Rupy
programme.desc: Preeti and Sanjeev struggle with their hectic work lives and their children's multiple meal demands, causing spiralling food bills and waste. Can Prue and Rupy's plan tickle everyone's taste buds?

programme.desc: Fadilat Ramadan ialah keistimewaan yang Allah SWT kurniakan dalam bulan yang mulia ini, di mana pahala amalan dilipatgandakan dan dosa diampunkan bagi mereka yang berpuasa dengan ikhlas. programme.title: Islam Itu Mudah
programme.desc: 'ISLAM ITU MUDAH' merupakan program agama di mana kandungan program ini akan mengupas tentang isu-isu berkaitan (IBADAH, AKIDAH, SIRAH, & selain perbincangan ISU SEMASA) yang menjadi tajuk pilihan pada minggu tersebut.

programme.title: Fadilat Ramadan & Azan Maghrib
programme.desc: Fadilat Ramadan ialah keistimewaan yang Allah SWT kurniakan dalam bulan yang mulia ini, di mana pahala amalan dilipatgandakan dan dosa diampunkan bagi mereka yang berpuasa dengan ikhlas. Ramadan juga bulan turunnya al-Quran dan mengandungi Lailatul Qadar yang lebih baik daripada seribu bulan. Bulan ini penuh rahmat, keberkatan dan peluang untuk mendekatkan diri kepada Allah SWT.

programme.title: Kapsul Indahnya Ramadan
programme.desc: Indahnya Ramadan ialah keistimewaan dan kelebihan bulan Ramadan yang membawa suasana penuh ketenangan, keberkatan dan rahmat. Pada bulan ini, umat Islam berpeluang memperbanyakkan ibadah, mendekatkan diri kepada Allah, serta merasai keindahan kebersamaan melalui puasa, solat tarawih dan amalan bersedekah. Ramadan menjadikan hati lebih bersih, sabar dan bersyukur.

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: Ep85, Ep86, Ep87-Steven is so excited to be back home that he jumps for joy, and jumps way too high.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Ep2, Ep27, Ep44, Ep107, Ep153-While preparing for a birthday party, Mordecai and Rigby are assigned to set up chairs. They try to prove to Benson they are not slackers, but fail.

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: Ep105, Ep184, Ep182, Ep181, Ep108-While trying to film his own indie film, Ben accidentally allows the Bug Gang to go free and when he takes the fight to their hidden lair, Ben has to take on their narcissistic leader - the Ant Queen.

programme.title: Courage The Cowardly Dog
programme.desc: Ep12A, Ep18A, Ep29A, Ep29B, Ep5A-The chicken from outer space returns to seek revenge on Courage. This time he wants Courage's heard to replace the one that Courage blew up.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Ep3, Ep17, Ep78, Ep118, Ep160-When Rigby eats too much junk food, his body forces out his consciousness. Rigby, Mordecai and Skips set out on a quest to get it back before sunset.

programme.title: Ben 10
programme.desc: Ep242, Ep164, Ep165, Ep167, Ep259-Ben gets a tough lesson on knowing his limits when he competes in a grueling obstacle race-- made even worse by the Weatherheads!

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Ep1290, Ep1305, Ep1278, Ep1280, Ep1291-In the final epic showdown with Carl Sanpedro, the Titans head to Croatia - the home of dragons and ice zombies.

programme.title: Super Shiro
programme.desc: Ep23, Ep24-Traces of the Bobobobobone are found at the space museum. Shiro & Deca sniff their way in. When Deca presses a button by mistake, the space ship they are on starts moving.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: Ep147, Ep148, Ep149, Ep150, Ep152-When volunteering at a retirement home, Buttercup meets an old woman who claims she used to be a superhero.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Ep70, Ep71, Ep72, Ep73, Ep74-Bean wants to avoid lunch with Irma's Mum at all costs. He persuades Mrs. Wicket to let him join her on a coach trip to a concert.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Ep133, Ep146, Ep175, Ep154, Ep180-Tweety spies a puddy from his perch.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World Of Gumball
programme.desc: Ep132, Ep128-Gumball and Nicole vow revenge on the driver of a car that cut them off.

programme.title: The Tom And Jerry Show

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO
programme.desc: Messy's hiccups cause a landslide while he is out on a nature walk. Will he be able to find his way home? And will he ever stop hiccupping?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Preston needs to knock down his shed, and Mojo has the wrecking ball to do it. But first, Mojo and Bo have to get it all the way across town, which is harder than it sounds!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. "If only we had more Duggee's" muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: Go Jetters

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Not wanting to go to bed, Bluey tries to dream about being a nocturnal fruit bat so she can stay up all night long and soon finds herself flying through the night sky.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout explore Uganda's impenetrable forests on a global adventure to find a new baby gorilla who's just learning how to climb and forage for himself.

programme.title: Playtime Towers
programme.desc: Bella plays funny games with Lift using her colourful towel. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who uses a big towel to make up a new dance - the Butterfly Boogie!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels hear a strange sound that they've not heard before, so they ask Duggee to help identify it.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels become enchanted when they hear a piece of music from Duggee's choir. They quickly learn what makes a choir.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels notice that Happy isn't acting like his normal self, and he's strangely wearing new trainers. Happy doesn't know what he's feeling, and his friends want to help him.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: The team roars into action as Glitch tries to take a selfie with a lion in the Maasai Mara.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: A game of hide and seek threatens to topple the fairy chimneys of Cappadocia in Turkey.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: When Thomas discovers a missing dog rummaging around the railway yard, he tries to find the dog a new home.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck
programme.desc: Sarah's hair keeps getting in her way, so it's time for a trip to the hairdressers.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck
programme.desc: Stumbling across an arcade, Sarah takes on a dancing challenge with John, whilst Duck and Flamingo team up to try and defeat a video game!

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Myrtle calls Stanley to see if she can practice her first aid skills on him, but he's all fit and healthy. Instead, they go about the town making good use of Myrtle's newfound abilities.

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Benjamin and Sophie have a new bug friend. Stanley helps build a bug feeder which attracts lots more bugs. They eat so much; Stanley gets more food and builds a Bug Hotel for them.

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue
programme.desc: Libby plays a game of football with her teddies. The pink team score lots of goals through the wide goals, but the orange team aren't scoring any through their narrow goals.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran take a trip to have JoJo's eyes tested at the opticians. Jaxon and Ezra help explain what it means to be long- and short-sighted.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee's made some delicious pancakes, but the clubhouse is out of honey. Time for the bees to get busy!

programme.title: nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. programme.title: TV Drama
programme.desc: Chinese produced television drama

programme.title: The 14 Amazons
programme.desc: The Yang family had served their country in Song Dynasty for generations. When General Yang is ambushed and killed during the war in Jin Shan, the grand matriarch led the entire family to take revenge and defend the country.

programme.title: Black Magic 2
programme.desc: Doctor Sing is puzzled by the strange symptoms of his patients and asks his friend for help. The sickness is apparently caused by a black magic that is casted by a wicked man Kong. Kong covets the beauty of Sing's wife and casts an evil love spell on her, while threatening to kill Sing at the same time. Can Sing save his wife and his patients?

programme.title: The Fake Ghost Catchers
programme.desc: Huan Zhu's ghost seeks help from “Fake Ghost Catchers” Bao Tuo and Zhou Peng, after a jealous suitor's ghost seeks vengeance by murdering her and now targeting her sister. Together with actor Wu Shun Chao who possesses a supernatural talent, they unite to protect Huan Zhu's sister from both mortal and spectral threats.

programme.title: Woman Of The Night
programme.desc: The movie offers three stories of love and obsession. In the first tale, a young student with a voyeuristic habit spies on two of his female roommates. The second story follows an office manager who develops an infatuation for his secretary. The last story is a complex family drama about a debilitated father who forces his family to leave him.

programme.title: The Story of Sue San
programme.desc: TIn this Huangmei Opera romance, Wang is the son of a respected government official whereas Sue San is a famous prostitute. Although they love each other and seem to be perfectly matched, the two are worlds apart when it comes to social ranking, which will prove hard to overcome...

programme.title: Apartment For Ladies
programme.desc: A Taiwanese singer comes to Hong Kong in search for her missing younger sister, who had arrived in Hong Kong to be discovered as a nightclub singer. She finds lodging at an apartment for women run by a man-hating landlady, Mrs Chan. However, Mrs Chan cannot confine the young ladies' youthful vitality within the apartment.

programme.title: The Heroic Ones
programme.desc: Set in the Tang Dynasty, the 13 adopted sons of Sha Tuo King are all renowned as royal warriors. David Chiang plays the 13th Prince, a powerful fighter whose prestigious status provokes jealously, leading to a gruesome family feud.

programme.title: My Son
programme.desc: Kuo, a police's son, blames his father for his mother's death. He has no job, spends time in night clubs and always gets into fights. One night, Kuo rescues Mei from being raped and they become friends. Kuo wants to support Mei and her family so he goes gambling hoping to gain more money but bad luck seems to be following them with tragic outcomes.

programme.title: The Convict Killer
programme.desc: After spending fifteen years in prison on trumped-up charges for drug smuggling, the martial arts master Teng Piao embarks on a journey to take revenge on the person who sets him up - “Black Leopard”. Unfortunately for Piao, no one knows the real identity of “Black Leopard”, except that there is a black leopard tattoo on his chest.

programme.title: Dead End
programme.desc: Uninhibited youth Chun meets a rich girl Wen when her car breaks down and drives her home. Chun falls in love with Wen but Wen's brother dislikes him and forbids his sister to see him. He humiliates Chun and gets Chun beaten up, so Chun takes the pistol he has found accidentally on the street to Wen's home and shoots her brother dead.

programme.title: Full Moon Scimitar
programme.desc: Swordsman Ding fought against many swordsmen and won, so he took his first defeat badly and wanted to commit suicide. It is then that he meets the granddaughter of a mystic Sect leader and falls in love. When they want to get married, the Sect leader presents Ding with the “Full Moon Scimitar”, on the condition that he will never leave the sect.

programme.title: Boxer Rebellion
programme.desc: The Empress Dowager Cixi believes the Boxers' claim that they have developed a kung fu that makes them impervious to weapons, thus declaring war against the alliances of eight foreign nations. The lack of weapons and good leadership in the Ching government allows the Eight Nation Alliances to take down Beijing.

programme.title: Call to Arms
programme.desc: The aggressive and dangerous Chin Empire conquers the hard-put Chao kingdom while the Wei empire is drained of its heroes and paralyzed by an indecisive ruler. Adventure, intrigue, death and tragedy reigns before the triumphant clash of the armies.

programme.title: Between Tears and Smiles
programme.desc: Fan Jia Shu is a kind-hearted student who is smitten with Shen, a heart-rending love song singer. However, he is not the only one who has eyes for Shen. The General's henchmen are also determined to present the songstress to their superior as a gift. Fan receives help from an unexpected person just in time to save the woman he loves.

programme.title: Between Tears and Smiles
programme.desc: Fan Jia Shu is a kind-hearted student who is smitten with Shen, a heart-rending love song singer. However, he is not the only one who has eyes for Shen. The General's henchmen are also determined to present the songstress to their superior as a gift. Fan receives help from an unexpected person just in time to save the woman he loves.

programme.title: The Deadly Knives
programme.desc: Martial arts student Yen returns from school to defend his family homestead against Japanese financiers after his father is killed. On the way, he meets Hua and falls in love with her. However, Hua discovers that her father is plotting with the Japanese to take Yen's property and wants to murder him. It is a tough choice between family and love…

programme.title: The Purple Shell
programme.desc: Hui and Ha are stuck in their unhappy marriages and are attracted to each other when they meet at a party. In one of their beach strolls, Ha picks up a purple shell and gives it to Hui as a memento. When Hui's husband finds out about them, he hurts Hui and causes her to become seriously ill, while also blackmails Ha. How will this love story end?

programme.title: Ten Tigers Of Kwang Tung
programme.desc: The Ten Tigers of Kwang Tung is a group of anti-Ching martial artists who have killed a Ching official. Years later, when five disciples and descendants of Ten Tigers meet one night, one of them is killed by the son of the late Ching official who returns with a vengeance. They must fight against him to protect the Ten Tigers clan…

programme.title: Shaolin Hand Lock
programme.desc: Li Cheng Ying's father was set up and killed by his old friend Ling Hao. Li, who has learnt “Shaolin Hand Lock” from his father, is on a mission to avenge his death. He works as an undercover guard at Ling's house where he meets his long-lost brother, and the two team up to take revenge for their father against Ling.

programme.title: The Singing Escort
programme.desc: Betty Ting plays Susan, a young woman hiding from her father by being a nightclub singer in Japan. Pop singer Chao Ke-jen (Lin Chong) gets permission from his boss to visit Japan, with the condition that he finds the boss's daughter. Boy finds girl, boy falls in love. But will the father approve?

programme.title: Disciples Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Yi is a skilled disciple of the Hong Quan style kung fu who work in a textile mill recommended by his senior, Han. Han warns Yi not to show off his martial arts skill so as to avoid getting into trouble. However, Yi does not listen and eventually gets dangerously involved in the conflict between two opposing textile mills.

programme.title: The Emperor and the Minister
programme.desc: The ingenious imperial scholar Liu Yung always embarrasses Emperor Chien Lung with his quick wit and gift of gab. The emperor purposely sets him up to solve the seemingly unsolvable. However, Liu Yung resolves it easily with wit and style and foils the emperor's plot once again.

programme.title: Marco Polo
programme.desc: Mongolian emperor Kublai Khan is being assassinated while meeting with the Italian explorer Marco Polo. Marco Polo is appointed to lead the troops for the emperor to wipe out the anti-Mongol rebels. Yet, he is touched by these rebels who are resisting the Mongolian invasion of their homeland. Will Marco Polo stay loyal to the emperor?

programme.title: The Venus' Tear Diamond
programme.desc: Legendary rival jewel thieves Fragrant Night and Nocturnal Earl travel to Japan to steal the famous Venus' Tear Diamond. They fall quickly in love at first sight, without knowing the other person is their rival and is after the same prize. Who will get the diamond, and will it mean the end of their new found love?

programme.title: The Bells of Death
programme.desc: Wei Fu is an unremarkable woodcutter. However, when psychotic marauders killed his family and abducted his sister, he goes through vigorous martial arts training with an expert swordsman in order to exact revenge on the evildoers.

programme.title: The Merry Wife
programme.desc: A 17-year old schoolgirl marries her 35-year-old teacher. Comedy ensues when they attempt to keep their relationship a secret despite being in the same school. When they discover unwanted suitors going after their other halves, jealousy threatens to expose their marriage any minute!

programme.title: The Eight Diagram Pole Fighter
programme.desc: The Yang Generals were ambushed by the enemies and only two of the sons survived. The fifth son of Yang's escapes to Shaolin temple and learns the pole-fighting techniques from the monks, eventually creating his own “Eight Diagram Pole Fight” and teaming up with the Shaolin monks to avenge his family.

programme.title: The Enchanting Ghost
programme.desc: It is love beyond the grave, as a young scholar and his beautiful lover are torn apart forever by his dastardly uncle and his friend, who drive the girl to commit suicide... but with death comes revenge for the enchanting ghost. A spooky yet heart-wrenching tale...

programme.title: The Five Venoms
programme.desc: A dying master dispatches his last pupil to track down five ex-students who are each an expert in his own lethal combat style. He fears they will steal the fortune belonging to their clan and tasks his pupil to prevent their attempt.

programme.title: The Happiest Moment
programme.desc: This erotic comedy anthology features three stories about an old man who dies from an overdose of virility pills, a cop who goes on the run after extorting money from a hooker, and a barber's apprentice who encounters a lively corpse in a night vigil. Through playing all these characters, Michael Hui proves himself as a genius of Hong Kong comedy.

programme.title: WE12
programme.desc: An underground organization, “The League of Kaito” has been maintaining international order. While 12 elite members possess extraordinary skills and have worked independently for a period of time, they must rekindle their long-lost team spirit to accomplish a mission together to save the world from disaster.

programme.title: The Narrow Road
programme.desc: Chak, a small cleaning company owner, hits tough times during the pandemic. In need of an assistant, he hires a young single mother Candy, who unexpectedly helps him solve many difficulties at work. While life seems to get back on track, a series of cruel realities happen again, but they still bond together to support each other on the narrow road.

programme.title: Crisis Negotiators
programme.desc: Negotiator Wai becomes the prime suspect in a police murder case. He takes hostages at the police station and demands to negotiate with former negotiator Jun. As the two engage in a high-stake battle of wits, their expertise in psychological manipulation leads to a tense verbal sparring match, gradually shifting their positions and mind sets.

programme.title: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: Based on a true event of a news investigative unit receiving a tip-off about the abuse of residents in an Elderly and Disabled Care Home. To expose the home's wrongdoings, reporter Kay goes undercover to expose the inhumanity and unveil the cruel truth under broad daylight.

programme.title: Tainted Love
programme.desc: Office lady Zhou Ran falls victim to an online dating love scam and is cheated of 550,000 yuan. Following faint clues left by the scammer, Zhou Ran comes to a small coastal town and encounters two young men. She gradually discovers that these two men have hidden the clues of the scam, and sets out on her revenge plan.

programme.title: The Bride With White Hair
programme.desc: As Wudang disciple Zhuo Yi Hang confronts the Demon Palace, he reunites with Lian Ni Shang, the woman who once saved him, and their love reignites. Lian, a disciple of the Demon Palace, endures torment to be with Zhuo but is shattered when he accidentally injures her. A fierce battle between good and evil unfolds!

programme.title: The Calling Of A Bus Driver
programme.desc: A girl named Suki fulfills her dream of being a bus driver after breaking up with her boyfriend, who has an affair with her good friend. When Suki is invited to attend her ex-boyfriend's wedding, she is presented with a chance for revenge - will she take it and turn her life around?

programme.title: All Suspects
programme.desc: A policeman on leave checks into a B&B, sharing the space with a detective novelist, a homeless drifter and a pianist. However, when the owner and the receptionist are found dead, the peaceful retreat turns into a web of suspicion and deceit. Each guest becomes both suspect and sleuth—each guarding a secret that could unravel the entire mystery.

programme.title: Z Storm
programme.desc: ICAC Chief Officer Luk is on the case of a corrupt policeman but finds all key witnesses killed when he starts to discover some clues. As investigation continues, Luk uncovers the fraud scheme of an organized corrupt group involving the government's $15 billion 'Care Fund'. He must fight against them to keep Hong Kong corruption free.

programme.title: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: Wei Xiao Bao is sent by a revolutionary group to be a spy in the imperial palace and find “The Sutra of 42 Chapters”. Xiao Bao soon befriends Emperor Kang Xi but must carry out his mission at the same time, so he is caught between two camps.

programme.title: Dragon Tiger Gate
programme.desc: Adapted from a famous Hong Kong comic, Tiger Wong is ambushed after he unwittingly took the Lousha Plaque but is saved by his brother Dragon Wong. They also befriended Turbo Shek during the fight and the trio forms a brotherhood. To avenge the death of the Dragon Gate masters, they train and vow to defeat Shibumi, the leader of Lousha Clan.

programme.title: Mama's Affair
programme.desc: Former talent manager Mei Fung stays home to take care of her husband and son after retirement. She decides to re-enter the entertainment business to find her value in life, and successfully transforms a local restaurant delivery boy, Fong Ching, into a young pop idol. This makes her teenage son, Jonathan, intensely jealous of Fong Ching.

programme.title: Ride On
programme.desc: Master Luo, a washed-up stuntman, trains his beloved horse “Red Hare” to be a stunt horse. Due to his debts though, “Red Hare” may be taken away by the debtors. Master Luo has no choice but to seek help from his estranged daughter, and the incident ends up becoming a golden opportunity for them to reconcile.

programme.title: Turns We Take
programme.desc: A spicy hot pot restaurant in Northeast China serves different types of customers every day. Amongst them are a sweet young couple, two wayward young men and a taxi driver. Despite being complete strangers to each other, their lives are intertwined by a traffic accident…

programme.title: Turns We Take
programme.desc: A spicy hot pot restaurant in Northeast China serves different types of customers every day. Amongst them are a sweet young couple, two wayward young men and a taxi driver. Despite being complete strangers to each other, their lives are intertwined by a traffic accident…

programme.title: The Rescue
programme.desc: An emergency occurs on an offshore drilling rig that would cause it to capsize and sink. The Emergency Response Unit races against the clock in a chopper rescue mission amidst dangerous explosions and fire. Captain Gao Qian must work seamlessly with his chopper pilot Zhao Cheng to rescue survivors using the most maverick and dangerous tactics.

programme.title: Mad Fate
programme.desc: A Master fortune teller predicts that Tung, a born psychopath, will be imprisoned for murder and tries to change his fate. A veteran detective believes Tung is a psychopathic serial killer after witnessing him kill a cat, and pursues him relentlessly. Can the Master change Tung's mad fate?

programme.title: July Rhapsody
programme.desc: A 40-year-old high school teacher is in midlife crisis. His marriage is on the rocks and he is involved in a taboo romance with a female student who has a crush on him. Meanwhile, his wife is off to care for her dying ex-lover who shares a complicated history with the couple...

programme.title: Over My Dead Body
programme.desc: This dark comedy begins with an unidentified corpse appearing at the doorstep of a residential flat. Fearing that the corpse will turn their flats into "haunted flats", which will cause a drastic drop in the property value, the four families living on the same floor attempt to move the corpse away, embroiling themselves in chaos.

programme.title: The Goldfinger
programme.desc: Inspired by Hong Kong's biggest financial scandal in the 1980s, this is a rags to riches story about Ching Yat Yin who is chairman of a listed company. With Ching's wealth and influence on the rise, ICAC senior investigator Lau Kai Yuen is determined to investigate the case, even if it means spending 15 years in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Customs Frontline
programme.desc: After boarding an unauthorized cargo ship and finding its entire crew dead, the Hong Kong Customs officers uncover a hidden cache of illegal weapons linked to an international conflict. As Customs officer Zhou Zheng Li and Interpol's Ying go undercover, they unveil a multinational operation with ties closer to home.

programme.title: The Fierce Wife
programme.desc: An Zhen divorces her husband after his infidelity but faces a pivotal decision four years later - to return to her cheating husband and old life or to embark on a new life with a new love?

programme.title: Death Stranding
programme.desc: To overhaul the underground gambling industry, the police join hands with the gambling association to crack down on illegal casinos. They auction off new casino licenses to regulate the industry, but this results in an upheaval in the gambling world, unveiling the hidden interests and secrets while sparking conflicts between gangs...

programme.title: Last Suspect
programme.desc: Lawyer Chen receives a mysterious call demanding her to defend a murder suspect after her daughter is kidnapped, and is told that she can only save her daughter by winning the case. As she starts investigation with the police and evidence emerges, Chen discovers the truth and reveals the mastermind. Can she rescue her daughter in time?

programme.title: The Infernal Walker
programme.desc: Ting is an undercover police who infiltrates a triad and Tuen is a triad mole being planted into the police force. While Tang is tired of being an undercover cop, Tuen wishes to quit the triad and become a real police. When the triad boss sets a trap to uncover the moles' identity, the two must fight for themselves.

programme.title: Look for a Star
programme.desc: Sam is a charismatic tycoon who has been divorced three times. When he meets Milan, a cabaret dancer and croupier, they immediately fall in love. However, their romance faces challenges when he proposes a prenuptial agreement, putting their budding relationship at risk.

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ""living in the future"!

programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Detik 12 Malam EP3
programme.desc: Rancangan ini diterajui oleh pengantara Detik 12 Malam iaitu Saiful Azmi Jamsari serta dibantu oleh krew-krew produksi sebagai pembantu penyiasatan. Kali ini pengantara berada di Galaeri Perfileman yang ditubuhkan pada 2007 terletak di KL. Asalnya bangunan banglo tersebut adalah sebuah rumah keluarga. Galeri ini menyimpan peralatanperalatan lama perfileman untuk dipamerkan. Pengalaman misteri yang pernah dilalui oleh Encik Muhammad Rosli, penjaga galeri dikongsi bersama, beliau pernah beberapa kali terjumpa dengan lembaga wanita berambut panjang, pergerakan perkakasan dan bunyi yang menakutkan. Pengantara bersama krew kemudiannya melakukan penyiasatan, mereka berada di situ selepas 12 malam. Mereka sendiri mengalami situasi yang hampir sama saperti diceritakan.

programme.title: Din Tiger EP7
programme.desc: Tan Sri Alif menghadapi krisis akibat kesilapan Anat yang semakin merumitkan operasi, ini menyebabkan Lai Chee berasa kecewa dan marah, dibelenggu dengan konflik emosi.

programme.title: Munafik 2
programme.desc: Dihantui oleh penglihatan menakutkan, seorang penyembuh muslim mendapati imannya diuji apabila membatu seorang perempuan yang terkurung didalam pertempuran, tubuh dan jiwa dengan seorang pemimpin yang jahat.

programme.title: Bisikan Syaitan
programme.desc: Pasangan Kamil dan Soraya mengikat perjanjian berdarah dengan kuasa jahat demi kemewahan, tetapi apabila Soraya ditangkap atas kes pembunuhan, rahsia mereka mula terbongkar dan gangguan ghaib menimpa keluarga.

programme.title: Din Tiger EP7

programme.title: Ganjil
programme.desc: Dunia mimpi tidak lagi menjadi tempat yang menenangkan, manakala dunia nyata terasa lebih menakutkan. Nabila dan Amry mula tertanya-tanya sama ada takdir sedang mempermainkan mereka dengan kejam.

programme.title: Detik 12 Malam EP3
programme.desc: Rancangan ini diterajui oleh pengantara Detik 12 Malam iaitu Saiful Azmi Jamsari serta dibantu oleh krew-krew produksi sebagai pembantu penyiasatan. programme.title: Onrust
programme.desc: Bramanto Putra, seorang pelajar arkeologi, menemui sebuah buku nota purba di Pulau Onrust yang telah tertimbus selama 300 tahun.

programme.title: Sosok Ketiga
programme.desc: Apabila Nuri menerima Yuni yang merupakan sahabat baiknya, sebagai madunya, dia mencetuskan siri supernatural dan konflik mendalam bagi memenangi semula cinta hati suaminya.

programme.title: Dabbe Bir Cin Vakasi
programme.desc: Rumah sebuah keluarga di Turki dirasuk roh jahat yang ingin membunuh manusia.

programme.title: Zerk
programme.desc: Fatma, yang kehilangan anak perempuannya akibat lemas di tasik, selepas beberapa ketika, menyangka bahawa anak perempuannya belum meninggal dunia dan mengambil anak perempuannya dari kuburnya dan membawanya pulang. Wanita itu, yang hilang keseimbangan mental pada siang hari, membunuh diri dengan menggantung diri.

programme.title: Black S2 EP8
programme.desc: Black dan Sofia keluar janji temu seharian. Tapi kebahagiaan hilang apabila 007 dan 416 membawa berita buruk buat Black - orang atasan tidak gembira dengan kurangnya kemajuan yang dibuat oleh Black. Borhan telah membuat penemuan yang mengerikan dan dia menyedari yang dia akhirnya telah menemui bukti muktamad. Semuanya tertuju ke arah seseorang yang dia syak selama ini, tapi dia membuat satu lagi penemuan yang sangat mengejutkan.

programme.title: Avengers Confidential: Black Widow & Punisher
programme.desc: Punisher dan Black Widow dihantar dalam misi untuk menghentikan Leviathan, sebuah organisasi pengganas global yang merancang untuk menjual teknologi S.H.I.E.L.D. yang dicuri kepada pembida tertinggi.

programme.title: Obsesi Dia EP13
programme.desc: Alia menyalahkan Ritz serta Dr Flora kerana menukar dan merahsiakan identitinya. Dia kesal seolah-olah dirinya dipermainkan walaupun setelah Ritz menjelaskan untuk keselamatan. Zacky mencari jalan untuk meyakin Alia dia tidak lagi berdendam terhadap Affiyah. Semetara itu rahsia Sophie mempergunakan Dr Zahir untuk memisahkan Affiyah dengan Zacky terbongkar. Adam dan Rafeeq sebenarnya ahli keluarga yang dikhianati oleh Tan Seri Jalaludin. Mereka bergabung untuk menghapuskan musuh-musuh mereka termasuk Affiyah, saksi utama kejadian bunuh.Sementara itu Zacky dan Sha gembira melihat bapa mereka sedar dari koma. Kegembiraan mereka disaksikan Tan Seri Jalaludin secara bersembunyi

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike Fallon "Accident Man", adalah pembunuh dingin, dia adalah yang terbaik dalam apa yang dia lakukan. Tetapi apabila orang yang disayangi diseret ke dunia bawah tanah London dan dibunuh oleh krewnya sendiri, Fallon terpaksa merobek kehidupan yang dia tahu untuk membalas dendam kepada orang yang sebenarnya bermakna kepadanya.

programme.title: Ganjil
programme.desc: Nabila dan Amry bertemu semula dalam mimpi tapi kali ini, mereka berada lebih lama daripada yang sepatutnya. Sekarang mereka mesti berdepan dengan luka dalam mereka dan akhirnya memahami takdir yang telah ditentukan buat mereka.

programme.title: Obsesi Dia EP14
programme.desc: Adam menyiasat kes kehilangan Nora. Suspek utama ialah Dr Zahir berdasarkan mimpi Alia.Dr Flora mengizinkan Alia dan Susan membawa Adam ke rumah Dr Zahir. Mereka pelik melihat Dr Zahir pulang bersama Sophie.Mereka menyelinap masuk dan mengesyaki sesuatu. Nyawa Sophie terancam apabila terjumpa mayat mangsa-mangsa Zahir dalam sebuah bilik. Berlaku perselisihan antara mereka yang jelas didengar oleh Adam,Alia dan Susan. Perselisihan itu menyebabkan Sophie dibunuh. Rahsia dia mengupah Dr Zakir untuk membunuh Alia dan Kai turut terbongkar.Dr Zahir dapat menghidu kehadiran Alia dan Susan. Dalam situasi berasingan Ritz didera dan diancam bunuh oleh seorang lelaki bertopeng

programme.title: Obsesi Dia EP14
programme.desc: Adam menyiasat kes kehilangan Nora. Suspek utama ialah Dr Zahir berdasarkan mimpi Alia.Dr Flora mengizinkan Alia dan Susan membawa Adam ke rumah Dr Zahir. programme.title: Detik 12 Malam EP21
programme.desc: Memaparkan pengantara Detik 12 Malam saudara Saiful Azmi Jamsari melakukan penyiasatan tentang kisah misteri yang berlaku di Klang, Selangor. Thevasayagam @ Deva Sasi seorang pengusaha Perkhidmatan Pengebumian kaum India beragama Hindu bersama pekerjanya Thirwarasan berkongsi maklumat mengenai khidmat syarikat imereka. Manakala Ganesan a/l Balakrishnan, Pembantu Tadbir di MPK yang mengurus Krematorium di Klang pernah mendengar bunyi yang menakutkan saperti ada orang yang menarik besi penarik abu. Manakala Narayanasamy seorang Sami berkongsi pengalaman budak menangis, kawasan kubur Hindu. Pengantara bersama krew kemudiannya melakukan penyiasatan dengan berada di lokasi tersebut selepas detik 12 malam. Pengantara sendiri mengalami mendengar suara ketawa dan menakutkan semasa berada di Krematorium dan tanah perkuburan.

programme.title: Detik 12 Malam EP21
programme.desc: Memaparkan pengantara Detik 12 Malam saudara Saiful Azmi Jamsari melakukan penyiasatan tentang kisah misteri yang berlaku di Klang, Selangor. Thevasayagam @ Deva Sasi seorang pengusaha Perkhidmatan Pengebumian kaum India beragama Hindu bersama pekerjanya Thirwarasan berkongsi maklumat mengenai khidmat syarikat imereka. Manakala Ganesan a/l Balakrishnan, Pembantu Tadbir di MPK yang mengurus Krematorium di Klang pernah mendengar bunyi yang menakutkan saperti ada orang yang menarik besi penarik abu. Manakala Narayanasamy seorang Sami berkongsi pengalaman budak menangis, kawasan kubur Hindu. Pengantara bersama krew kemudiannya melakukan penyiasatan dengan berada di lokasi tersebut selepas detik 12 malam. Pengantara sendiri mengalami mendengar suara ketawa dan menakutkan semasa berada di Krematorium dan tanah perkuburan.

programme.title: Din Tiger EP8
programme.desc: Michelle memarahi Din atas kehancuran yang ditimbulkannya dalam hidup mereka, ini jugak mengakibatkan Elyn untuk melakukan keputusan yang diraguinya sendiri.

programme.title: Bunohan
programme.desc: 3 abang pulang ke kampung Bunohan dengan tiga alasan yang sangat berbeza; mereka akan menemui kematian, penipuan dan wahyu yang sangat suram.

programme.title: Paku
programme.desc: Filem ini mengisahkan tentang Fahmi (Johan As'ari) yang amat mencintai isterinya Riana (Aishah Ilias) dan dia tidak dapat menerima kenyataan bahawa isterinya sudah meninggal dunia. Oleh kerna disebabkan ketaksuban cintanya itu membuatkan Fahmi sanggup mencari seorang bomoh untuk menghidupkan semula Riana. Riana telah berjaya dihidupkan semula dan mereka bersatu sehinggalah Riana melahirkan seorang anak. Namun benarkah itu adalah Riana? Apakah yang akan terjadi kepada kehidupan Fahmi selepas itu?

programme.title: Din Tiger EP8
programme.desc: Michelle memarahi Din atas kehancuran yang ditimbulkannya dalam hidup mereka, ini jugak mengakibatkan Elyn untuk melakukan keputusan yang diraguinya sendiri.

programme.title: War Path
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh kontrak menerima pekerjaan berbahaya yang tidak betul, meletakkan nyawa isterinya dalam bahaya.

programme.title: Taxi 2
programme.desc: Duta Jepun sedang melawat Marseilles untuk melihat taktik anti-geng polis bandar. Semasa lawatan itu, bagaimanapun, dia diculik oleh kumpulan yang bekerja untuk yakuza Jepun. Pegawai muda Emilien berazam untuk menyelamatkan duta dan pegawai Petra (teman wanitanya), yang turut diculik, dan memulihkan kehormatan jabatannya. Sekali lagi, pemandu teksi syaitan laju Daniel (dari filem Teksi pertama) dipanggil untuk menyelamatkan hari dengan kemahiran memandu lajunya.

programme.title: Tuyul
programme.desc: Daniel dan Mia berpindah ke rumah ibu Mia selepas ibunya meninggal dunia. Selepas membersihkan salah satu bilik, Daniel menemui sebotol yang tersembunyi secara misteri di bawah lantai kayu. Botol kosong itu mungkin merupakan rumah kepada makhluk menakutkan yang berpotensi membahayakan Daniel, Mia dan bayi mereka yang belum lahir.

programme.title: Obsesi Dia EP13
programme.desc: Alia menyalahkan Ritz serta Dr Flora kerana menukar dan merahsiakan identitinya. Dia kesal seolah-olah dirinya dipermainkan walaupun setelah Ritz menjelaskan untuk keselamatan. Zacky mencari jalan untuk meyakin Alia dia tidak lagi berdendam terhadap Affiyah. Semetara itu rahsia Sophie mempergunakan Dr Zahir untuk memisahkan Affiyah dengan Zacky terbongkar. Adam dan Rafeeq sebenarnya ahli keluarga yang dikhianati oleh Tan Seri Jalaludin. Mereka bergabung untuk menghapuskan musuh-musuh mereka termasuk Affiyah, saksi utama kejadian bunuh.Sementara itu Zacky dan Sha gembira melihat bapa mereka sedar dari koma. Kegembiraan mereka disaksikan Tan Seri Jalaludin secara bersembunyi

programme.title: Obsesi Dia EP14
programme.desc: Adam menyiasat kes kehilangan Nora. Suspek utama ialah Dr Zahir berdasarkan mimpi Alia.Dr Flora mengizinkan Alia dan Susan membawa Adam ke rumah Dr Zahir. Mereka pelik melihat Dr Zahir pulang bersama Sophie.Mereka menyelinap masuk dan mengesyaki sesuatu. Nyawa Sophie terancam apabila terjumpa mayat mangsa-mangsa Zahir dalam sebuah bilik. Berlaku perselisihan antara mereka yang jelas didengar oleh Adam,Alia dan Susan. Perselisihan itu menyebabkan Sophie dibunuh. Rahsia dia mengupah Dr Zakir untuk membunuh Alia dan Kai turut terbongkar.Dr Zahir dapat menghidu kehadiran Alia dan Susan. Dalam situasi berasingan Ritz didera dan diancam bunuh oleh seorang lelaki bertopeng

programme.title: Ölümlü Dünya
programme.desc: Keluarga Mermer menjalani kehidupan berganda dengan bekerja di restoran milik keluarga mereka sambil menjadi pembunuh upahan untuk sebuah organisasi antarabangsa. Selepas rahsia mereka terbongkar, keluarga yang tidak berfungsi ini perlu bekerjasama untuk terus hidup.

programme.title: Accident Man
programme.desc: Mike Fallon "Accident Man", adalah pembunuh dingin, dia adalah yang terbaik dalam apa yang dia lakukan. Tetapi apabila orang yang disayangi diseret ke dunia bawah tanah London dan dibunuh oleh krewnya sendiri, Fallon terpaksa merobek kehidupan yang dia tahu untuk membalas dendam kepada orang yang sebenarnya bermakna kepadanya.

programme.title: The Equalizer S3 EP6
programme.desc: Selepas remaja mati akibat pil fentanyl, seorang vigilante menyerang secara membabi buta — dan McCall menjadi suspek utama dalam siasatan.

programme.title: Detik 12 Malam EP21
programme.desc: Memaparkan pengantara Detik 12 Malam saudara Saiful Azmi Jamsari melakukan penyiasatan tentang kisah misteri yang berlaku di Klang, Selangor. Thevasayagam @ Deva Sasi seorang pengusaha Perkhidmatan Pengebumian kaum India beragama Hindu bersama pekerjanya Thirwarasan berkongsi maklumat mengenai khidmat syarikat imereka. programme.title: Hollow Man 2
programme.desc: Seorang detektif Seattle dan seorang ahli biologi sedang melarikan diri daripada pembunuh upahan halimunan yang berbahaya dan menjadi penyangak.

programme.title: Arjuna EP1
programme.desc: Istana Adipura diserang oleh musuh mereka, Grakus dan pengikut-pengikutnya Lang Kajai dan Nading. Untungnya, Arjuna, anak Adipura dan Rupasari sempat dibawa lari dan dihanyutkan oleh ibu saudaranya, Cintasari. Arjuna membesar tanpa mengetahui kisah silamnya sehinggalah berlaku pergaduhan dan dia diselamatkan oleh Mikael dan Suria.

programme.title: The Equalizer S3 EP7
programme.desc: Seorang penyanyi terkenal yang hendak bersara menerima ancaman dari peminat berbahaya, lalu McCall dipanggil untuk menyelesaikannya.

programme.title: Detik 12 Malam EP22
programme.desc: Memaparkan pengantara Detik 12 Malam saudara Saiful Azmi Jamsari dengan dibantu krew produksi melakukan penyiasatan tentang kisah misteri yang berlaku di Shah Alam, Selangor. Mereka merungkai mengenai misteri kuarters tinggal yang terdapat di situ. Saudara Din Paranormal Explorer membawa pengantara mengunjungi kuarters berkenaan yang telah dikosongkan. Beliau pernah bertemu dengan lembaga perempuan terbang berkeliaran di situ. Manakala Lisa seorang peserta Fit For Action bersama pengantara dan krew melakukan penyiasatan dengan berada di lokasi selepas detik 12 malam. Mereka sendiri mendengar suara seorang perempuan menangis dan bunyi misteri yang menakutkan. Kuarters tersebut memang berpuaka

programme.title: JEJAK RASUL 3
programme.desc: Jejak Rasul ke Alpujarra dan daerah Al Buhkara iaitu kawasan pendalaman Sepanyol dan di kaki banjaran Seira Nevada. Dikatakan di sinilah tempat Islam berkubu di peringkat akhir sebelum dikalahkan Ferdinand pada 1492.

programme.desc: You see there was a time when Elephant had no nose. He couldn't swat away the flies, or scrub his belly… he couldn't even blow his nose. Then one day snappy Crocodile snapped! programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Snake did have legs… hundreds and hundreds of them. But poor old Snake had no eyes, not a single eye on his head. Then on the day of the great Tinga Tinga Festival of Colours Snake quite literally bumped into Millipede who was stuck in a hole. They decided to swap eyes and legs just for one day. So that Snake could see all the wonderful colours and Millipede could run all over Tinga Tinga. But when Snake came back to return Millipede's eyes, Millepede couldn't be found anywhere! So to this day, Snake has no legs. Tales from Africa.

programme.desc: The evil genius Karl sets out to destroy King Julien. When both Clover and Maurice are captured, King Julien must save them from his new nemesis.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Exhausted from settling his subjects' disputes, King Julien replaces himself with a dummy king so he can play hooky, unwittingly sparking a rebellion.

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Eager to get the campers out of his hair, Krupp orders them to climb Plummet Peak, where a terrifying creature is rumored to reside.

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Harold and George don't ask for much -- just a fun scavenger hunt that doesn't include doing Krupp's errands. Careful what you wish for, fellas.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire's train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can't stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret “Echo” Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi's absence to sneak into Shashi's Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the “keys” in Shashi's mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When the banana bread Harper leaves out for Eden is stolen, the Dew Drops create a sting operation to catch the thief. / When Captain Meow Meow gets a splinter in his paw and hears the word "vet," he flees. Now it's up to the Dew Drops to find Captain Meow Meow and get that splinter out.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Harper's drone flies away it's up to the Dew Drops to get it back. And while Eden wishes she could fly like a drone, she learns that she can do great things with or without wings. / When Dylan loses his first tooth the Dew Drops learn that the Tooth Fairy will be coming and Athena tries so hard to make a good impression that she almost ruins Dylan's first lost tooth experience.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When the crew takes on a mission to help Ian get some rest for a Badminton Tournament, Jax realises that the biggest approach isn't always the best approach. / When Lula loses her comic book, Ari learns that the best heroes rely on teamwork and not gadgets.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When a pesky gopher gets in the way of Fawna making her famous veggie stew, Niah learns to not let a bad experience, get in the way of doing good. / When the inexperienced Rona has to step in for Donna, the team makes sure everyone has the best camping trip ever.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep has the first pen pal in Gulp Gorge/Gran sends Ugga and Eep on the first treasure hunt when she decides to pass on her inheritance

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep and Thunk become obsessed with a new trend known as “quicktogramming”/Grug accidentally causes the first outbreak of a “super bug”

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: Lured into an empty hotel where a baby has supposedly gone missing, the team is trapped by Crispin Biscuits, a chaotic British schoolboy baby who's been hired to wreck Boss and Tina's lives. Crispin puts the new company's loyalty to a test in a series of fiendish puzzling mind games, all with the threat of constant balloon popping (horrible for baby ears!)

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: Our team's startup company and their rivals at Baby Corp get in a “Space Race”, competing to see who can make the cutest kiddie-pretend “moon landing” for a baby - a spectacle sure to bring in a bounty of Baby Love. With both companies pouring their resources into a simulated space take off, tempers and sabotage are running hot, and the scrappy little startup is in danger of getting crushed by their big business competitor.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: The Dragon Riders discover a lush island that turns out to be the home of the Deathsong, a massive dragon that threatens to trap them forever.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: On an island that will make the perfect outpost, the Dragon Riders discover its indigenous residents are a mysterious new breed of dragon.

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: When Erica makes fun of George and Harold's latest and greatest comic, they make a comic about her becoming a vampire

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When an alien beetle infestation threatens to expose their true identities, the Royals must depend on a new ally for help. Meanwhile, Zadra joins Morando's army as a double agent who secretly spies on him for the growing Resistance.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Stuck in a time-loop, Aja finds unlikely help from Jim Lake and Team Trollhunters. Meanwhile, a giant Troll rampages the Arcadia High Science Fair, threatening to expose both the Troll world and Aja and Krel's alien secret.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: After Boss insults Tina's imaginary friend, he's forced into "Imaginary Friend Sensitivity Training" at Baby Corp. Boss makes up his own imaginary friend to get out of these meetings, but after Tina gets a whiff that he may be lying, he's forced to keep up the charade at work and at home.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: It's a turf war when Bounce House Bruiser Baby encroaches on Delivery Baby's tricycle park! Tina attempts to befriend Bruiser in order to woo her back to the bounce house, but naughty behavior is the only language Bruiser understands. Determined to win this kid over, Tina ends up going rogue as a trike hoodlum, and her own field team is forced to reign her in.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss takes an overdue vacation day, and ends up teaching Tabitha the value of "trading up" valueless objects into something she actually wants, an electric scooter. However, a 5%er baby is in trouble and BB's field team has "got it under control"… or do they? Boss tries to juggle his Tabitha lessons with sneaking peeks at the mission in progress

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. However, after the events of 103 Po is now a wanted criminal, so the Emperor's Forbidden Company arrives and captures him. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales
programme.desc: After finding a majestic horse in the wild, Lucky and the girls set out to solve the mystery of where she came from -- and where she truly belongs.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: With academy life on the horizon, the PALs work together to tame wild yearling Governor before they leave. But maybe he's not meant to be broken.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Lucky doesn't want her friends to miss their favorite Miradero traditions while they're away at school. So why not celebrate them all in one day?

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep and Thunk become obsessed with a new trend known as “quicktogramming”/Grug accidentally causes the first outbreak of a “super bug”

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep & Thunk cheer up Squawk to avoid the first final exam/Eep and Lerk venture to the Garden of Eaten after the Broods spike the Watering Hole

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: To learn about jobs, Grug assigns kids to the first “shadowing”/Ugga mistakenly creates the first gossip to impress the “nitting” club

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: On an island that will make the perfect outpost, the Dragon Riders discover its indigenous residents are a mysterious new breed of dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Thinking he's allergic to Meatlug, Fishlegs gets hypnotized - and wakes up transformed into an invincible warrior known as Thor Bonecrusher.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Dagur the Deranged captures Gustav, it's up to Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders to get him back.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Blinky, Toby and Claire make a dangerous trade with the Janus Order while Gunmar sets Jim up in a battle to the death

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Gunmar discovers Jim's friends are in the Darklands, it becomes a race against time as the Trollhunters and Gunmar try to escape

programme.title: Ketika Cinta Bertasbih 2
programme.desc: Lanjutan dari Ketika Cinta Bertasbih yang mengisahkan Azzam kembali ke Indonesia selepas 9 tahun belajar di Kairo. Walaupun sudah bergelar sarjana, dia sukar cari kerja dan dipengaruhi tekanan masyarakat. Sambil menambah pengalaman berniaga, Azzam juga berdepan konflik cinta apabila wanita yang dicintainya telah dipinang sahabatnya, sementara Eliana yang menyukainya sendiri belum dapat diterimanya sebagai pilihan hati.

programme.title: Abang Lejen
programme.desc: Dua beradik yang kehilangan ibu bapa mereka sejak kecil. Si abang sanggup mempertaruhkan nyawanya demi melindungi adiknya walau apa pun yang terjadi.

programme.title: Longkai
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang geng 'longkai' (tonto atau penunda kereta). Eddie dan Bada ialah adik-beradik longkai yang terkenal. Semua kenderaan yang ditunda oleh mereka akan dibawa ke bengkel Rimau. Walaupun dia seorang wanita, Rimau berperwatakan sedikit tomboy dan lasak. Rimau telah jatuh cinta dengan Bada, tetapi dia tidak pernah berani untuk meluahkan perasaannya walaupun dia nampak 'tough'.

programme.title: Adnan Sempit Sawadikap
programme.desc: mengisahkan Adnan (Shaheizy Sam) yang lucu, bersama isteri dan anaknya, memulakan perjalanan ke Thailand bersama sahabat baik mereka, Bobby dan Wawa, di mana pelbagai lagi pengembaraan menanti.

programme.title: Syahadah Terakhir
programme.desc: Telefilem ini mengisahkan tentang Pak Yusuf yang amat menyayangi anak-anaknya, Razlan dan Rafidah, tetapi selepas kematian isterinya, dia mula menumpang di rumah anak-anaknya dan sikapnya yang cerewet serta kerap membanding-bandingkan harta menyebabkan konflik keluarga. Rafidah menjadi tersepit antara suaminya Zaidi dan tekanan dari bapanya.

programme.title: Reaksiar
programme.desc: Program yang memaparkan perkongsian pengalaman dan reaksi artis-artis jemputan setelah melihat kembali klip-klip lakonan mereka.

programme.title: Perindu Senja
programme.desc: Che Embun, seorang wanita tua, setiap hari menanti kepulangan suaminya, Bakar, yang hilang di laut. Menjelang Aidilfitri, dia berharap suaminya akan kembali apabila menghidu rendang itik kegemarannya. Sambil menunggu, Che Embun juga menjaga dan melindungi seorang gadis istimewa bernama Nomi daripada perlakuan buruk ibunya. Cerita ini tentang cinta, pengharapan dan kesetiaan walau diuji masa dan penantian.

programme.title: Adnan Sempit 2
programme.desc: Adnan, seorang penunggang motosikal jalanan yatim piatu yang dijaga oleh ibu saudaranya. Sebaliknya, Nadia dilahirkan dalam keluarga kaya dan kini memiliki pekerjaan yang stabil. Kedua-dua insan yang berbeza ini bertemu secara kebetulan dan akhirnya menjalin hubungan. Kini, dalam "Adnan Sempit 2", Shaheizy Sam kembali memegang watak sebagai Adnan, mengisahkan cabaran dan dugaan dalam kehidupannya serta hubungannya dengan Nadia.

programme.title: One, Two, Trivia
programme.desc: Sebuah program yang merungkai fakta-fakta menarik yang tersimpan dalam filem-filem klasik tempatan

programme.title: Adnan Sempit 3
programme.desc: NADIA dan WAWA disahkan mengandung! ADNAN gembira kerana akhirnya dia bakal menjadi seorang bapa. Dia bersedia untuk menjaga NADIA, tetapi sebaliknya, dia yang mengalami alahan pagi dan pelbagai gejala kehamilan. Sementara itu, WAWA dan BOBBY menjalani kehidupan yang sederhana dan menghadapi masalah kewangan. WAWA mula marah kepada BOBBY kerana mereka tidak mempunyai cukup wang semasa tempoh kehamilannya dan menjelang kelahiran. Sebagai seorang kawan yang baik, ADNAN meminjamkan wang kepada BOBBY. Namun, BOBBY tidak lagi berani meminta wang daripada ADNAN selepas dimarahi olehnya yang tertekan dengan keadaan NADIA. Akibat desakan hidup, BOBBY membuat keputusan untuk berlumba semula.

programme.title: Ruang Temu
programme.desc: Program temu bual bersama Tony Eusoff yang mengupas pengalaman peribadi beliau berkaitan pengalaman beliau di dalam industri seni

programme.title: Hantu Tenggek
programme.desc: Sekumpulan penipu yang diketuai oleh Tariq yang berpura-pura mengusir tempat berhantu telah diperas ugut oleh Tuan Sidek, seorang pemaju bangunan. Mereka perlu meyakinkan pesaing Tuan Sidek bahawa bangunan tertentu berhantu apabila mereka terperangkap di dalamnya. Kecuali mereka tidak perlu meyakinkan kerana bangunan itu benar-benar dihantui oleh roh yang tidak tenteram. Roh memerlukan bantuan mereka untuk memenuhi hasrat terakhirnya

programme.title: Salina
programme.desc: Salina tinggal di sebuah banglo cantik yang mempunyai sejarah misteri. Apabila kejadian aneh dan menakutkan mula berlaku, terutamanya terhadap anak-anaknya, Salina mula menyiasat sejarah banglo itu untuk melindungi mereka. Namun, keadaan menjadi semakin teruk sehingga membawa kepada kematian yang tidak dijangka.

programme.title: Surga Di Telapak Kaki Ibu
programme.desc: Kisah Bayu, remaja yang hidup bersama ibunya setelah ayahnya meninggal. Bayu merasa tertekan kerana kemiskinan dan sering menyalahkan ibunya atas nasib mereka. Namun, ketika ibunya jatuh sakit, Bayu mula menyedari kasih sayang dan pengorbanan besar seorang ibu serta pentingnya taat dan berbakti kepadanya.

programme.title: Melawan Takdir
programme.desc: Filem ni kisahkan perjalanan hidup Quraisy Mathar sendiri (pengarah filem ni). Ia mengangkat pengalaman hidupnya yang penuh cabaran sejak kecil — kehilangan orang tersayang, jatuh bangun dalam hidup, sampai berjaya jadi seorang sineas. Cerita ni tunjuk bagaimana semangat, doa, dan keyakinan boleh buat seseorang bangkit walaupun diuji dengan pelbagai takdir yang pahit.

programme.title: Melawan Takdir
programme.desc: Filem ni kisahkan perjalanan hidup Quraisy Mathar sendiri (pengarah filem ni). Ia mengangkat pengalaman hidupnya yang penuh cabaran sejak kecil — kehilangan orang tersayang, jatuh bangun dalam hidup, sampai berjaya jadi seorang sineas. Cerita ni tunjuk bagaimana semangat, doa, dan keyakinan boleh buat seseorang bangkit walaupun diuji dengan pelbagai takdir yang pahit.

programme.title: Ketika Cinta Bertasbih
programme.desc: Cerita tentang Azzam, seorang pemuda yang berpegang teguh pada nilai-nilai Islam, berusaha menuntut ilmu sambil mengekalkan cinta kepada Tsuraya. Mereka menghadapi pelbagai ujian, konflik keluarga, dan rintangan sosial, namun keyakinan dan keimanan membimbing mereka menempuh cabaran cinta dan kehidupan.

programme.title: Ketika Cinta Bertasbih
programme.desc: Cerita tentang Azzam, seorang pemuda yang berpegang teguh pada nilai-nilai Islam, berusaha menuntut ilmu sambil mengekalkan cinta kepada Tsuraya. programme.desc: For a cow to produce milk, she must give birth to a calf. Female calves later become dairy cows themselves, while male calves are surplus to the dairy industry's requirements. They're packed into trucks and suffer in transit on their way to fattening facilities.

programme.title: In Good Shape
programme.desc: A cough is common with a cold. But persistent coughing, shortness of breath, or chest pain could signal pneumonia, whooping cough, or even chlamydia infection.

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Chamber Of Secrets
programme.desc: The famous boy wizard and his friends are back at Hogwarts to save the school from a terrible evil.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo
programme.desc: Lazlo gets a new best friend. It's not another camper but a parasitic leech that is stuck to his head!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo
programme.desc: The Bean Scouts and the Squirrel Scouts settle their mud puddle squabble during a 'friendly' picnic.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo
programme.desc: The campers send the Jelly Beans on a 'wild goose chase' so they won't bungle the camp inspection!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo
programme.desc: A bunch of mosquito bites forms a treasure map on Raj's behind, and the Jellies hunt for a secret treasure!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo
programme.desc: Lumpus can't get the Jelly Beans to turn their lights out!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo
programme.desc: Lazlo helps Raj prepare for the camp swimming test, but Raj is terrified of even the tiniest drop of water!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo

programme.title: The Ocean's Greatest Feast
programme.desc: Get a front-row seat to the planet's biggest biomass migration, the annual 1,000-mile sardine run along South Africa's east coast. See billions of these tiny fish run a gauntlet of hungry predators, including stealthy seals and dive-bombing gannets.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia
programme.desc: Explore the shores of the Northern Territory and the abundant waters of the Great Barrier Reef. Face flooded roads, hungry saltwater crocs, and killer jellyfish as Lizzie investigates why so many strange, deadly creatures make this remote area home.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia
programme.desc: Say goodbye to the tropics and dip into cool southern-coast waters. Come face to face with majestic grey nurse sharks, shape-shifting cuttlefish, and huge blue whales; play with penguins and sea lions; and learn why these seas are brimming with life.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia
programme.desc: Complete the trip's final lap in the untamed lands where Australia's interior desert meets the hot, hostile Indian Ocean. Confront the challenges of survival in this region as Lizzie dives with tiger sharks, manta rays, and nomadic turtles.

programme.title: Ireland's Wild Islands With Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Begin on Rathlin, where flightless guillemot chicks take a leap of faith and golden hares welcome the dawn. Head to Tory to see basking sharks, dolphins, and the endangered corncrake's dance of love. Then chase adorable Irish stoats across Achill.

programme.title: Ireland's Wild Islands With Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Continue the odyssey along Ireland's west coast. Spy on the love affairs of grey seals in the Inishkea Islands and ply Connemara's turquoise waters. Wander in Clare's magical woods and catch hundreds of basking sharks engaged in a mating display.

programme.title: Ireland's Wild Islands With Eoin Warner
programme.desc: Learn how Arctic terns negotiate a 50,000-mile-a-year commute to summer in Kerry's Maharee Islands. Go whale-watching off Brandon Head, then witness Ireland's greatest wildlife spectacle: a 1,000-strong colony of grey seals on Great Blasket Island.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: Italy's Mount Etna is one of the best places for volcano watchers and volcanologist Tom Pfeffier is hoping to get lucky and see a paroxysmal eruption, a short and very intense eruption that produces spectacular lava fountains.

programme.title: Tusker: Brotherhood of Elephants
programme.desc: Become immersed in the intricate lives of tuskers with Craig, Pascal, and Esau, three male African elephants in all stages of life. Get a rare glimpse into the subtle language, complex interactions, and deep bonds of the world's largest land mammal.

programme.title: The Great Elephant Tale
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of three elephants across three very distinct African habitats. Their travels combine to tell the story of how these emotional and intelligent creatures evolved over millions of years to survive on the continent.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Cheer as young gladiators earn their stripes in the dense tropical forests of the Americas. Stand back as a poison dart frog launches a toxic barrage, observe a jaguar-caiman turf war, and see a hungry coati cross paths with a defensive tarantula.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: Big Cat Country
programme.desc: The all-female Hollywood pride have been in exile after being attacked by the four Nomad brothers. But their leader, Ava, decides to lead her family south to the heart of their territory for a showdown with the Nomads.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Beni faces his weigh-in while Alba is back in isolation. Pujon reclaims his position as gang leader. A team heads out to rescue an infant orangutan. And an unwelcome visitor prompts the staff to introduce a cautionary lesson in snake awareness.

programme.title: Island Of The Monsoon
programme.desc: A manmade lake in Minneriya National Park supports the largest concentration of elephants in Asia. Follow a young male who has reached a turning point toward adulthood. In the rainforest, jungles teem with a variety of bizarre species of insects.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys
programme.desc: The number one tourist attraction on the island of Hawaii is a volcano called Kilauea. After a sudden collapse of the crater floor, a massive eruption drains the volcano of lava and now Kilauea is silent. Geologist Phillip Ong finally has his chance to explore.

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Head to America's far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

programme.title: Coral City
programme.desc: Discover the most fantastic city of them all lying beneath the waves, where romance and migratory commuters flood the coral reef's main highways. Follow a green sea turtle looking for love and sit in with a cassowary dad tending his newborn chicks.

programme.title: Coral City
programme.desc: Feel the heat of summer's arrival as supersize sea snails try to fend off an invading gang of coral-hungry starfish. Accompany reef sharks as they prowl for a midnight meal and marvel at the slippery disguise a parrotfish uses to survive the night.

programme.title: Life's Journey
programme.desc: If young animals survive until adulthood, the chances for survival are greatly increased - but many challenges face them before they can strike out on their own. Some have months to grow-up; other have decades - but all, have lots to learn along the way. From getting to grips with their bodies and learning to feed themselves, to practicing fighting skills and learning how to form friendships. There are many hurdles along the way, but every small success could mean the difference between life and death.
